name: Pickled Jalepenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Sterilize pint or half pint canning jars.
2. In each jar, place a clove of garlic (optional) and a sprig of Mexican oregano (also optional but highly recommended).
3. Pack the washed peppers into the jars.
4. For a hotter product, prick each pepper a couple of times with a fork (I don't know why, but it seems to work).
5. Fill the jars with boiling vinegar until the peppers are well covered.
6. Seal the jars tightly.
- Note: I am NOT a canning/preserving expert and have done very little of this process. These were made a couple of times as an adult and turned out fine, but there may be more expert opinions available.
